scripts.lint: if command -v actionlint >/dev/null 2>&1; then actionlint -color -ignore=:info: -ignore=:style:; else echo 'actionlint not installed'; fi
scripts.prepare: node -e "try { (await import('husky')).default() } catch (e) { if (e.code !== 'ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND') throw e }" --input-type module
